rationale: Falsifiability: every bead verifies via named pass/fail checks — go test -run patterns, git show --name-only zero-diff facts, cmp mirror, grep pins (verified 'Model  string' two-space form exists), node matrix with negative controls, go list -deps leaf check; Provenance maps all 5 ACs to named tests. TestSanitizeNonBeadDecision sourcing messages from the REAL PanelGateDecision is a drift-proof pin. Contradiction: the zero-diff-vs-hygiene tension RESOLVES — I verified at 001ed3a5 that all malformed rendering for verify/tally lives in cmd/mindspec (renderPanelVerify/renderPanelTally/tallyExitAction), the spec scopes the hygiene falsifier to those verbs and itself fences instruct's d.Message snapshot as unchanged, and the four rewrite rules cover every reachable non-bead leg (2/4/6/8/9/10 carry only RawMergeFence(""); 5/5b have dedicated rules; leg 7 unreachable — panelBeadWorktreePath short-circuits on empty beadID). TestPanelTally_ExitCodeTracksDecision does assert bead-row d.Message equality as claimed; exec.IsRefNotFound is errors.Is(gitutil.ErrRefNotFound) as claimed. All 4 carry-forwards present (O1 CLI-layer mandate, O2 ADR-0034 re-attribution, F2 legs-2/4 precision, F3 verify/tally wording + interfaces.md doc-sync step 6). ADR Fitness, Testing Strategy, Provenance all substantive.
findings: VERIFIED (contradiction lens, load-bearing): zero-byte internal diff and message hygiene can both hold. Grounded at 001ed3a5: gate.go legs (2)/(4)/(6)/(8)/(9)/(10) interpolate beadID only via RawMergeFence("") (rule 1 strips it); legs (5)/(5b) match rules 2-3 exactly ('references branch bead/,', 'panel for : ', 'could not verify branch bead/'); leg (7) is unreachable for non-bead because panelBeadWorktreePath returns "" before panelWorktreeListFn; leg (3) abandoned carries no malformed fragment. The spec's hygiene falsifier is scoped to non-bead verify/tally rendering, and the spec itself fences instruct's fbel.3 snapshot (which consumes d.Message incl. RawMergeFence("") on legs 8-10) as unchanged this wave — no contradiction.

VERIFIED: all named test infra exists (mkPanelTestRoot, writePanelFixture, snapshotTree, resetPanelCreateFlags, stubWorktreeListEmpty, withTestChdir, buildResult, guard.HasFinalRecoveryLine, gitutil.ErrRefNotFound, TestPanel_GateFieldDecisionInert, reviewerCountNotesFor at config.go:535, resolvers at 750/766/777/832, PanelGateKeys at config.go:101, Panel.Gate omitempty at panel.go:91, CreateInput has no Gate field today, SHELL_METACHAR_RE at ms-panel.js:138 with mirror cmp-identical). TestPanelTally_ExitCodeTracksDecision (panel_test.go:367) asserts d.Message equality against panel.PanelGateDecision on bead rows — it is the bead byte-identity falsifier the plan claims. panel verify's Long text already documents 'always exits 0' — the F3 carry-forward wording matches the code's own contract.

VERIFIED: all 4 spec-panel carry-forwards folded — (1) O1 CLI-layer message mandate named in Bead 1 ('both confined to cmd/mindspec/panel.go (panel carry-forward O1)'); (2) O2 ADR-0034 re-attribution to spec 112 R1's PanelGateKeys contract in ADR Fitness plus Bead 3 step 2's provenance note; (3) F2 legs-(2)/(4)-can-Block precision paragraph in Bead 1; (4) F3 verify=read-only / tally=advisory-but-block-capable wording with the interfaces.md doc-sync in Bead 1 step 6.

MINOR (non-blocking): Bead 1 frontmatter key_file_paths lists internal/panel/gate.go and internal/instruct/panelstate.go, which the bead body pledges receive a ZERO-byte diff — an implementer skimming frontmatter could read them as editable. The zero-diff verification checks enforce the fence regardless; suggest the bead brief flag them as read-only context.

MINOR (non-blocking): step 1's empty-Target path (error 'panel.json records no target ref' -> leg 5b) flows into the rewritten fragment 'could not verify target <ref>' with an empty ref interpolation; cosmetic only — the wrapped error text names the cause, and no spec falsifier bans an empty target interpolation. The sanitizer could substitute '(no target recorded)'.

NOTE: plan pins claims to HEAD 3ddf2a1f while the panel reviews 001ed3a5; verified 3ddf2a1f is an ancestor and every cited line ref/symbol still holds at 001ed3a5 (resolvePanelGateFacts 302-315, revParseForPanelFn 37-39, gate.go leg 5 at 186-189, ResolveGateFacts 372, panelstate.go verdict 99-136).
